description: This file provides utility functions to generate versioned HTML attribute objects for including Bootstrap CSS and JS files with correct paths and integrity attributes based on environment (production or development). It references configuration and path management from external libraries.

methods.name: export function getVersionedBsCssProps(direction: 'rtl' | undefined) { getVersionedBsCssProps
methods.description: Returns HTML attributes for a <link> element pointing to the appropriate Bootstrap CSS file, adjusting for RTL direction and environment for minification and integrity hash.

methods.name: export function getVersionedBsJsProps() { getVersionedBsJsProps
methods.description: Returns HTML attributes for a <script> element pointing to the appropriate Bootstrap JS bundle, adjusting for environment for minification and integrity hash.
